channel.title: Context Engineering Daily
channel.description: Daily news and research updates in AI Context Engineering, Prompt Engineering, RAG, and LLM development

item.title: DEAF: A Benchmark for Diagnostic Evaluation of Acoustic Faithfulness in Audio Language Models
item.description: arXiv:2603.18048v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent Audio Multimodal Large Language Models (Audio MLLMs) demonstrate impressive performance on speech benchmarks, yet it remains unclear whether these models genuinely process acoustic signals or rely on text-based semantic inference. To systematic...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> large language model, prompt, framework, study, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Continually self-improving AI
item.description: arXiv:2603.18073v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Modern language model-based AI systems are remarkably powerful, yet their capabilities remain fundamentally capped by their human creators in three key ways. First, although a model's weights can be updated via fine-tuning, acquiring new knowledge fro...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> research, arxiv, fine-tuning, model, instruction | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Multi-Trait Subspace Steering to Reveal the Dark Side of Human-AI Interaction
item.description: arXiv:2603.18085v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent incidents have highlighted alarming cases where human-AI interactions led to negative psychological outcomes, including mental health crises and even user harm. As LLMs serve as sources of guidance, emotional support, and even informal therapy,...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, context, framework, study, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: TeachingCoach: A Fine-Tuned Scaffolding Chatbot for Instructional Guidance to Instructors
item.description: arXiv:2603.18189v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Higher education instructors often lack timely and pedagogically grounded support, as scalable instructional guidance remains limited and existing tools rely on generic chatbot advice or non-scalable teaching center human-human consultations. We prese...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> GPT, tool, study, arxiv, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: A Computationally Efficient Learning of Artificial Intelligence System Reliability Considering Error Propagation
item.description: arXiv:2603.18201v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly prominent in emerging smart cities, yet their reliability remains a critical concern. These systems typically operate through a sequence of interconnected functional stages, where upstream errors m...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> analysis, RAG, framework, platform, ICL | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Retrieval-Augmented LLM Agents: Learning to Learn from Experience
item.description: arXiv:2603.18272v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While large language models (LLMs) have advanced the development of general-purpose agents, achieving robust generalization to unseen tasks remains a significant challenge. Current approaches typically rely on either fine-tuning or training-free memor...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> large language model, memory, analysis, context, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Context-Engineering - "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.
item.description: "Context engineering is the delicate art and science of filling the context window with just the right information for the next step." — Andrej Karpathy. A frontier, first-principles handbook inspired by Karpathy and 3Blue1Brown for moving beyond prompt engineering to the wider discipline of context design, orchestration, and optimization.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> prompt, context, context window, prompt engineering | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: ThinkSound - [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.
item.description: [NeurIPS 2025] PyTorch implementation of [ThinkSound], a unified framework for generating audio from any modality, guided by Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, chain-of-thought, reasoning, audio, CoT | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: PageIndex - 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG
item.description: 📑 PageIndex: Document Index for Vectorless, Reasoning-based RAG<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, reasoning, vector | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Cline-Recursive-Chain-of-Thought-System-CRCT- - A framework designed to manage context, dependencies, and tasks in large-scale Cline projects within VS Code

item.title: LightRAG - [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"
item.description: [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, augmented, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: KAG - KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.
item.description: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> knowledge base, RAG, framework, vector, reasoning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Kiln - Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.
item.description: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, fine-tuning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: graphrag - A modular graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system
item.description: A modular graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, augmented, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: R2R - SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.
item.description: SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> product, RAG, retrieval, augmented, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: openlit - Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.
item.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> prompt, framework, platform, vector, LLM | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, model, tool, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: cosmos-reason1 - Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.
item.description: Cosmos-Reason1 models understand the physical common sense and generate appropriate embodied decisions in natural language through long chain-of-thought reasoning processes.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, model, chain-of-thought | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Don't Vibe Code, Do Skele-Code: Interactive No-Code Notebooks for Subject Matter Experts to Build Lower-Cost Agentic Workflows
item.description: arXiv:2603.18122v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Skele-Code is a natural-language and graph-based interface for building workflows with AI agents, designed especially for less or non-technical users. It supports incremental, interactive notebook-style development, and each step is converted to code ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
item.description: ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> Hugging Face Blog | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, embedding | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (Hugging Face Blog)

item.title: OpenViking - OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
item.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, memory | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Claude-Code-Everything-You-Need-to-Know - The ultimate all-in-one guide to mastering Claude Code. From setup, prompt engineering, commands, hooks, workflows, automation, and integrations, to MCP servers, tools, and the BMAD method—packed with step-by-step tutorials, real-world examples, and expert strategies to make this the global go-to repo for Claude mastery.
item.description: The ultimate all-in-one guide to mastering Claude Code. From setup, prompt engineering, commands, hooks, workflows, automation, and integrations, to MCP servers, tools, and the BMAD method—packed with step-by-step tutorials, real-world examples, and expert strategies to make this the global go-to repo for Claude mastery.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> prompt, tool, example, step-by-step, prompt engineering | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Adaptive Domain Models: Bayesian Evolution, Warm Rotation, and Principled Training for Geometric and Neuromorphic AI
item.description: arXiv:2603.18104v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Prevailing AI training infrastructure assumes reverse-mode automatic differentiation over IEEE-754 arithmetic. The memory overhead of training relative to inference, optimizer complexity, and structural degradation of geometric properties through trai...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> memory, framework, arxiv, model, paper | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
